title: Young Adults' Experiences of Limiting their Social Media Use 2021
description: The dataset consists of interviews with young adults on their experiences of voluntarily limiting their social media use. The interviews were divided into four sections. The first questions were related to the identification and initial stages of the interviewees' problematic social media use. The interviewees were asked to describe, among other things, at what point they started to consider their use of social media as problematic.
